name: Super top-up recommendation for existing policy
description: User has ₹5L base policy and asks about super top-up

input.message: I have a ₹5 lakh company health insurance. But I am worried it won't be enough. Should I buy a super top-up? How does it work and what's the cost?

notes: Super top-up: activates after deductible (= base cover). ₹20L super top-up with ₹5L deductible costs ~₹4,000-8,000/year for 35-year-old. Total effective cover = ₹25L at much lower cost vs ₹25L independent policy.
